recent_projects.name: crisp-python
recent_projects.summary: Simple python interface to control robots that use crisp_controllers and other ROS2 components.

recent_projects.name: valediction
recent_projects.summary: Valediction is a convenience data validation package that allows generation, import, and constraint enforcement of user-defined data dictionaries against datasets.

recent_projects.name: mousetail
recent_projects.summary: Standalone MCP server that enables LLMs like Claude to interact with Anki flashcard collections using Anki's Python library
recent_projects.author: Iain Maitland

recent_projects.author: Sebastiaan Mathôt

recent_projects.name: pvtlib
recent_projects.summary: A library containing various tools in the categories of thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, metering etc.
recent_projects.author: Christian Hågenvik

recent_bad_license_projects.name: brachinus
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: AES-256 CBC file encryption library with support for individual files and directory batch operations.

recent_bad_license_projects.name: pybuc
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: Fast estimation of Bayesian structural time series models via Gibbs sampling.
recent_bad_license_projects.author: Devin D. Garcia

recent_bad_license_projects.name: ai4ce-helpers
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: Functions to help interact with the AI4CE backend
recent_bad_license_projects.author: Alexander Salge

recent_bad_license_projects.name: powl
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: POWL Miner: Process Mining with the Partially Ordered Workflow Language
